ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the booking */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type booked */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel where the booking is made */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the hotel is located */,
  "accommodation_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accommodation type */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "checkin_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer checks in */,
  "checkout_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer checks out */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_accommodation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("accommodation_type_id") REFERENCES accommodation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hotel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the hotel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel chain */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotels_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES chains ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the accommodation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accommodation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel chain */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel chain */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the hotel chain */,
  "head_office_address" TEXT /* Head office address of the hotel chain */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the hotel chain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_enrolled" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is enrolled in a loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  "is_recommendation" INTEGER /* Whether the customer recommends the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking for which payment is made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel offering the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount period */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code for promotional purposes */,
  "minimum_stay_required" INTEGER /* Minimum stay required to apply the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Whether the amenity is free or chargeable */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge for the amenity, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel offering the room type */,
  "room_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the room type */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy for the room type */,
  "is_smoking_allowed" INTEGER /* Whether smoking is allowed in the room type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_types_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which availability is being tracked */,
  "available_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of available rooms */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Whether the room type is available on the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id")
)
